title: Add ontology pressure report (Golden Test 17)
problem: ticket-018 completes contract-gated follow-up generation, but ontology pressure detection is not yet implemented. Golden Test 17 requires draft ontology proposals with evidence claims and no auto-activation.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 17: ontology pressure report proposes but does not auto-activate new concepts.
acceptance_criteria: Deterministic ontology pressure report when golden claim thresholds are met without Ollama.
Report proposes concepts in draft status with evidence claim IDs and aliases; no auto-activation.
non_goals: Do not implement LangGraph or live web discovery.
Do not add public write routes.
